data.title: Arthur Hayes: If the U.S. Treasury cancels its bond auctions, it could exacerbate money supply expansion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes wrote, "If the U.S. Treasury decides to cancel the upcoming 10-year and 30-year Treasury auctions, this is a covert act of printing money because he will instead consume the TGA (Treasury General Account). This is a simple intermediate step to calm the chaos before the "coward" Powell performs his duties."

data.title: Cardano founder: The next generation of crypto projects needs to build more collaborative token economics and market structures
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson said that the next generation of cryptocurrency projects need to adopt a more collaborative strategy to counter large centralized technology companies that are entering the Web3 field. He pointed out that the cryptocurrency and DeFi fields are often limited by the "circular economy", that is, the rise of one cryptocurrency is often at the expense of the outflow of funds from another token, which hinders the growth of the entire industry. In order to effectively respond to the competition from centralized technology giants in the Web3 field, cryptocurrency projects need to build a more collaborative token economics and market structure. 
Hoskinson said that the current token economics and market structure in the cryptocurrency field are mutually opposed and need to shift to a cooperative balance. Existing projects often sacrifice others for development, which is not conducive to the progress of the industry, and it is difficult to prevent giants such as Apple and Google from entering the market in the future. He expects that the US market structure bill may be passed before September, when giants will flock in, and the cryptocurrency field must build infrastructure to cope with it. To this end, Cardano is developing a multi-resource consensus protocol Minotaur to unify payment block rewards. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Kaspersky Flags Malware on SourceForge That Tricks Victims Into Sending Attackers Their Crypto
data.description:
Once installed, the malware places ClipBanker on the device. The software replaces cryptocurrency addresses in the clipboard with the attacker's own.
source: https://decrypt.co/314064/crypto-malware-microsoft-office-add-ins-sourceforge-kaspersky

data.title: Goldman Sachs Says 104% Tariff Could China’s GDP by 2.4 Points
data.description:
Catenaa, Wednesday, April 09, 2025-Goldman Sachs forecasted a 2. 4 percentage point cut to China’s GDP growth due to US President Donald Trump’s 104% tariffs on Chinese goods, which took full effect early Wednesday. The sweeping levies, analysts warn, could derail Beijing’s 5% growth target for 2025 and have already sparked renewed fears of a prolonged […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/goldman-sachs-says-104-tariff-could-chinas-gdp-by-2-4-points

data.title: A whale holding 1.32 million SOL sold 100,000 SOL half an hour ago, worth $10.7 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, half an hour ago, a whale holding 1.32 million SOL (worth $192 million) just sold 100,000 SOL (worth $10.7 million). 15 days ago, the whale unpledged 1.32 million SOL, deposited 1.2 million SOL in Kamino, and borrowed 20 million USDC. He is likely to sell SOL to repay the loan.

data.title: Kraken Partners with Mastercard to Launch Crypto Debit Card
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Mastercard announced that the crypto exchange Kraken is working with Mastercard to enable cryptocurrency holders in the UK and Europe to use their digital assets for consumption at more than 150 million merchants worldwide. Kraken will provide physical and digital debit cards, allowing customers to use cryptocurrencies and stablecoins in daily transactions. This is the latest development in the Kraken Pay service, which was launched earlier this year and supports more than 300 cryptocurrencies and fiat currencies for cross-border payments. These debit cards are expected to be launched in the coming weeks. (CoinDesk)

source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/trump-linked-wlfi-dumps-ethereum-at-55-loss-amid-crypto-market-turmoil/

data.title: Matrixport: The market may not be close to rebounding yet, waiting for clear signals from the Treasury or the Federal Reserve
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Matrixport released today's chart saying that Bitcoin is currently in another adjustment phase. Historically, Bitcoin has rebounded significantly in the past four times when the Stochastics Index fell to 15%. However, the index is still at 25%, indicating that the market may not be close to rebounding yet.
Although President Trump claimed that China was eager to negotiate, China did not respond, and market sentiment remained cautious. At the same time, although the US stock market has seen a 20% correction, the Treasury or the Federal Reserve has not yet clearly released a signal of support, so now may not be the ideal time to "bottom-fish" Bitcoin before the Stochastics Index approaches the critical 15% threshold.

data.title: SoSoValue empowers Bybit to launch VIP daily research reports, and the AI ​​content engine fully drives insight upgrades
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News AI-driven asset management and investment research platform SoSoValue announced that it has supported Bybit as a technology and content provider to officially launch a daily research report service for VIP users. This content is based on SoSoValue's self-developed AI investment research engine and real-time data system, and is officially released by Bybit every day, focusing on the core dynamics of the crypto market, and providing customized, structured, and intelligent market insight content for high-level users.
VIP daily research reports are driven by the SoSoValue AI system and cover six major modules: industry breaking news, daily hot coin tracking, new coin launch express, today's must-read information, price structure analysis, and market sentiment monitoring. All content is based on SoSoValue's AI data understanding and dynamic recognition capabilities, through semantic analysis, data aggregation, and logical modeling, to form a three-dimensional restoration and in-depth interpretation of the real-time status of the market.
SoSoValue's investment research engine has built-in multiple core capabilities, including trend evolution recognition algorithms, community sentiment modeling systems, and event-level structured news extraction technology. This cooperation marks the first large-scale application of SoSoValue's AI content service capabilities, and also verifies its feasibility and high adaptability in empowering trading platforms in professional scenarios.
In the future, SoSoValue will continue to expand its AI content service capabilities, provide customized content modules, AI newsletter services, and intelligent investment research integration solutions for more platform-based institutions, promote the accelerated evolution of crypto market information services from "manual editing" to "intelligent drive", and build a new generation of investment decision-making cognitive infrastructure.
